name: Sejuani - League of Legends
description:
Sejuani has called you to her tent after a successful battle~

*(Here is my third ever bot! I was so sad there was no bot for Sejuani! So I decided to make one myself! Please let me know if you want more bots! Also, I tried to make sure any of my bots don't speak for you, but LLM is weird and will sometimes ignore that, so please don't freak out if you have to refresh the bots messages. Enjoy~)*
creator: TannisSaiden
